title: helichrysum glandulosum
intro: Helichrysum glandulosum, also known as the false everlasting, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum glandulosum lie in its essential oil, which is rich in compounds such as dihydrofuranoides and sesquiterpenes, and is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for various health conditions. Helichrysum glandulosum is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and topical creams, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
